name: Visit Petrol Expense Report
query:
select
AA.CustomerOrLead,
AA.Name,
(case when AA.Day1 = 0 then '' else AA.Day1 end) as "1:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day2 = 0 then '' else AA.Day2 end) as "2:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day3 = 0 then '' else AA.Day3 end) as "3:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day4 = 0 then '' else AA.Day4 end) as "4:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day5 = 0 then '' else AA.Day5 end) as "5:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day6 = 0 then '' else AA.Day6 end) as "6:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day7 = 0 then '' else AA.Day7 end) as "7:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day8 = 0 then '' else AA.Day8 end) as "8:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day9 = 0 then '' else AA.Day9 end) as "9:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day10 = 0 then '' else AA.Day10 end) as "10:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day11 = 0 then '' else AA.Day11 end) as "11:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day12 = 0 then '' else AA.Day12 end) as "12:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day13 = 0 then '' else AA.Day13 end) as "13:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day14 = 0 then '' else AA.Day14 end) as "14:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day15 = 0 then '' else AA.Day15 end) as "15:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day16 = 0 then '' else AA.Day16 end) as "16:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day17 = 0 then '' else AA.Day17 end) as "17:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day18 = 0 then '' else AA.Day18 end) as "18:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day19 = 0 then '' else AA.Day19 end) as "19:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day20 = 0 then '' else AA.Day20 end) as "20:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day21 = 0 then '' else AA.Day21 end) as "21:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day22 = 0 then '' else AA.Day22 end) as "22:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day23 = 0 then '' else AA.Day23 end) as "23:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day24 = 0 then '' else AA.Day24 end) as "24:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day25 = 0 then '' else AA.Day25 end) as "25:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day26 = 0 then '' else AA.Day26 end) as "26:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day27 = 0 then '' else AA.Day27 end) as "27:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day28 = 0 then '' else AA.Day28 end) as "28:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day29 = 0 then '' else AA.Day29 end) as "29:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day30 = 0 then '' else AA.Day30 end) as "30:Data:100",
(case when AA.Day31 = 0 then '' else AA.Day31 end) as "31:Data:100",
(case when AA.Total = 0 then '' else AA.Total end) as "Total:int:100"
from
(select CV.customer as "CustomerOrLead",
CV.customer_name as "Name"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=1 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day1"

,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=2 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day2"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=3 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day3"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=4 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day4"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=5 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day5"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=6 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day6"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=7 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day7"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=8 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day8"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=9 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day9"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=10 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day10"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=11 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day11"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=12 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day12"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=13 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day13"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=14 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day14"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=15 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day15"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=16 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day16"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=17 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day17"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=18 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day18"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=19 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day19"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=20 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day20"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=21 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day21"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=22 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day22"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=23 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day23"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=24 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day24"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=25 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day25"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=26 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day26"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=27 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day27"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=28 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day28"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=29 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day29"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=30 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day30"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=31 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Day31"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where  monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and customer=CV.customer and employee = CV.employee) as "Total"


from `tabCustomer Visit` as CV
where  (monthname(CV.date)= %(month)s) and year(CV.date)= %(year)s and CV.employee=%(employee)s 

group by CV.customer

union all 

select CV.lead as "CustomerOrLead",
CV.lead_name as "Name"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=1 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day1"

,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=2 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day2"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=3 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day3"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=4 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day4"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=5 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day5"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=6 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day6"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=7 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day7"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=8 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day8"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=9 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day9"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=10 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day10"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=11 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day11"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=12 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day12"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=13 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day13"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=14 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day14"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=15 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day15"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=16 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day16"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=17 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day17"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=18 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day18"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=19 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day19"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=20 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day20"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=21 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day21"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=22 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day22"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=23 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day23"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=24 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day24"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=25 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day25"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=26 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day26"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=27 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day27"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=28 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day28"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=29 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day29"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=30 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day30"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=31 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Day31"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where  monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and lead_name=CV.lead_name and employee = CV.employee) as "Total"


from `tabCustomer Visit` as CV
where  (monthname(CV.date)= %(month)s) and year(CV.date)= %(year)s and CV.employee=%(employee)s 

group by CV.lead_name

union all 

Select 'Total' cust,'' custname,
(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=1 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and employee = CV.employee) as "Day1"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=2 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and employee = CV.employee) as "Day2"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=3 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and employee = CV.employee) as "Day3"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=4 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and employee = CV.employee) as "Day4"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=5 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date) and employee = CV.employee) as "Day5"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=6 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day6"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=7 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day7"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=8 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day8"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=9 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day9"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=10 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day10"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=11 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day11"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=12 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day12"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=13 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day13"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=14 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day14"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=15 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day15"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=16 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day16"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=17 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day17"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=18 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day18"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=19 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day19"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=20 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day20"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=21 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day21"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=22 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day22"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=23 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day23"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=24 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day24"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=25 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day25"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=26 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day26"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=27 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day27"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=28 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day28"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=29 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day29"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=30 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day30"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where day(date)=31 and monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Day31"
,(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` where  monthname(date)=monthname(CV.date) and year(date)=year(CV.date)  and employee = CV.employee) as "Total"
from `tabCustomer Visit` as CV
where  (monthname(CV.date)= %(month)s) and year(CV.date)= %(year)s and CV.employee=%(employee)s
group by cust

)AA

Union ALL

Select z.Customer as "Customer:Data:150",
z.CustomerName as "CustomerName:Data:150"
,z.Day1 as "Day 1:Data:100"
,z.Day2 as "Day 2:Data:100"
,z.Day3 as "Day 3:Data:100"
,z.Day4 as "Day 4:Data:100"
,z.Day5 as "Day 5:Data:100"
,z.Day6 as "Day 6:Data:100"
,z.Day7 as "Day 7:Data:100"
,z.Day8 as "Day 8:Data:100"
,z.Day9 as "Day 9:Data:100"
,z.Day10 as "Day 10:Data:100"
,z.Day11 as "Day 11:Data:100"
,z.Day12 as "Day 12:Data:100"       
,z.Day13 as "Day 13:Data:100"
,z.Day14 as "Day 14:Data:100"
,z.Day15 as "Day 15:Data:100"
,z.Day16 as "Day 16:Data:100"
,z.Day17 as "Day 17:Data:100"
,z.Day18 as "Day 18:Data:100"
,z.Day19 as "Day 19:Data:100"
,z.Day20 as "Day 20:Data:100"
,z.Day21 as "Day 21:Data:100"
,z.Day22 as "Day 22:Data:100"
,z.Day23 as "Day 23:Data:100"
,z.Day24 as "Day 24:Data:100"
,z.Day25 as "Day 25:Data:100"
,z.Day26 as "Day 26:Data:100"
,z.Day27 as "Day 27:Data:100"
,z.Day28 as "Day 28:Data:100"
,z.Day29 as "Day 29:Data:100"
,z.Day30 as "Day 30:Data:100"
,z.Day31 as "Day 31:Data:100"
,z.Total as "Total:currency:100"
from
(

select "Bill Nos." as Customer,
"" as CustomerName
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=1 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day1"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=2 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day2"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=3 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day3"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=4 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day4"
,(select GROUP_CONCAT(PED.bill_no) from `tabExpense Claim` as EXC inner join `tabPetrol Expense Detail` as PED on EXC.name=PED.parent where day(PED.date)=5 and monthname(PED.date)=monthname(PE.date) and year(PED.date)=year(PE.date) and employee=EC.employee) as "Day5"
